hooks.command: deno fmt --check 2>&1 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Formatting check failed. Run deno fmt before committing."}'; exit 0; }; deno test --parallel --allow-all --unstable-raw-imports 2>&1 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Tests failed. Fix failing tests before committing."}'; exit 0; }
hooks.statusMessage: Running fmt check + tests before commit...
